basic_details.short_information: Zakir Husain Delhi College (ZHDC Evening) Nurse Notification 2026 has been released on 26 May 2026 on the official website of Zakir Husain Delhi College. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ZHDC Evening Nurse Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Nursing / B.Sc. Nursing / Post Basic B.Sc. (Nursing) OR Diploma in General Nursing and midwifery. Registered Nurse with State Nursing Council. Minimum 6 months to 1 year experience in a 50-bedded hospital.
qualification.details: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Nursing from a recognized University or Institute OR Regular Course in B.Sc. Nursing from a recognized University or Institute OR Post Basic B.Sc. (Nursing) from recognized University or Institute. Registered as Nurse or Nurse and Midwife (RN or RN and RM) with State Nursing Council. Six months experience in a minimum 50 bedded hospital after acquiring the educational qualification. OR Diploma in General Nursing and midwifery from a recognized Board or Council. Registered as Nurse or Nurse and midwifery (RN or RN and RM) with State Nursing Council. One year experience in a minimum 50 bedded hospital after acquiring the educational qualification.
